message:
feat: add termweb-open package, improve dashboard treemaps

termweb-open:
- Universal file opener that routes to appropriate viewers
- Built-in image viewer with zoom/pan controls
- Detects file types by extension and magic bytes

Dashboard improvements:
- Fix memory percentage to use total (not used+free)
- Fix disk treemap to show percentages relative to disk capacity
- Unconfirmed folders share remaining space equally during scan
- Click header to return to main view from detail views
- Remove process limit in CPU/memory treemaps (show all)
- Show processes only in treemaps (htop/btop style)
- System usage shown in label, not as treemap cell

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1 @@ +(()=>{var m=new URLSearchParams(window.location.search),h=m.get("file"),g=m.get("name")||"Image",y=m.get("type")||"image";document.title=g;var i=document.getElementById("container"),a=document.getElementById("image"),k=document.getElementById("info"),n=1,c=0,s=0,u=!1,l=0,d=0;function t(){a.style.transform=`translate(${c}px, ${s}px) scale(${n})`}function f(){let e=i.getBoundingClientRect(),o=a.naturalWidth,w=a.naturalHeight,p=e.width/o,b=e.height/w;n=Math.min(p,b,1),c=0,s=0,t(),r()}function r(){k.textContent=`${g} | ${a.naturalWidth}x${a.naturalHeight} | ${Math.round(n*100)}%`}h&&(a.src=`file://${h}`,a.onload=()=>{f()},a.onerror=()=>{i.innerHTML=`
Failed to load image: ${g}
`});document.addEventListener("keydown",e=>{switch(e.key){case"+":case"=":n=Math.min(n*1.25,10),t(),r();break;case"-":case"_":n=Math.max(n/1.25,.1),t(),r();break;case"0":n=1,c=0,s=0,t(),r();break;case"f":case"F":f();break;case"ArrowLeft":case"h":c+=50,t();break;case"ArrowRight":case"l":c-=50,t();break;case"ArrowUp":case"k":s+=50,t();break;case"ArrowDown":case"j":s-=50,t();break}});i.addEventListener("wheel",e=>{e.preventDefault();let o=e.deltaY>0?.9:1.1;n=Math.max(.1,Math.min(10,n*o)),t(),r()});i.addEventListener("mousedown",e=>{u=!0,l=e.clientX,d=e.clientY,i.style.cursor="grabbing"});document.addEventListener("mousemove",e=>{u&&(c+=e.clientX-l,s+=e.clientY-d,l=e.clientX,d=e.clientY,t())});document.addEventListener("mouseup",()=>{u=!1,i.style.cursor="grab"});})();

@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+{
+  "name": "termweb-open",
+  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "description": "Universal file opener - routes to the appropriate termweb viewer/editor",
+  "bin": {
+    "termweb-open": "bin/cli.js"
+  },
+  "scripts": {
+    "build": "esbuild src/app.js --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/app.bundle.js",
+    "start": "node bin/cli.js"
+  },
+  "files": [
+    "bin/",
+    "dist/"
+  ],
+  "keywords": [
+    "terminal",
+    "file",
+    "viewer",
+    "open",
+    "universal",
+    "cli"
+  ],
+  "author": "teamchong",
+  "license": "MIT",
+  "repository": {
+    "type": "git",
+    "url": "git+https://github.com/teamchong/termweb.git",
+    "directory": "packages/open"
+  },
+  "publishConfig": {
+    "access": "public"
+  },
+  "dependencies": {
+    "termweb": "^0.9.8"
+  },
+  "devDependencies": {
+    "esbuild": "^0.19.0"
+  },
+  "optionalDependencies": {
+    "termweb-pdf": "^0.1.0",
+    "termweb-markdown": "^0.1.0",
+    "termweb-notebook": "^0.1.0",
+    "termweb-json": "^0.1.0",
+    "termweb-editor": "^0.1.0"
+  }
+}
